name: Warleader's Bulwark (Greater)
description:
This +2 resilient breastplate is made from shining bronze overlaid with reinforcing golden panels emblazoned with images of loyal soldiers. Wearing this breastplate grants you a commanding aura. You gain a +3 item bonus to Diplomacy checks, but you take a -3 item penalty to Stealth checks to Hide and Sneak and Deception checks to Impersonate.

Activate—Command Bravery (1 Action) (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You grant allies within 100 feet a +2 status bonus to saves against fear effects for 1 minute. When you activate this ability, each affected ally who's Frightened reduces their frightened value by 1.

Effect: Command Bravery
